H00462496.name: Badir Mohamed Jabir Ahmed Almaazmi
H00462496.bio:
Bachelor student, Computer & Information Science, Higher Colleges of Technology.
Email: H00462496@hct.ac.ae | Phone: 54-5071371

tasks.title: Database Audit
tasks.desc: Perform a full security audit of the Tabashir PostgreSQL database and source code. Document roles, privileges, hardcoded credentials and sensitive data with severity ratings.

tasks.title: Security Remediation
tasks.desc: Fix the vulnerabilities found in Week 1. Move all hardcoded credentials to .env files, enable SSL on database connections, create a least-privilege PostgreSQL role (tabashir_app), and set password expiration on all roles.

tasks.title: Penetration Testing
tasks.desc: Perform SQL injection testing, authentication bypass attempts, and session analysis on the Tabashir test environment. Document all findings with severity ratings and produce a penetration test report.

tasks.title: CVSS Vulnerability Report
tasks.desc: Score all vulnerabilities found in previous weeks using the CVSS framework. Produce a professional vulnerability report with executive summary, findings table, and prioritised recommendations.

tasks.title: External Website Audit — tabashir.ae
tasks.desc: Perform a full black-box external security audit of the live tabashir.ae website. Test HTTP security headers, SSL/TLS configuration, and DNS security records. Document all findings in a professional audit report.

tasks.desc: Detailed requirements document and system architecture diagram covering scraping, AI matching, DeepSeek, email and PostgreSQL.

tasks.title: Auto-Apply Performance Project — Smart Caching
tasks.desc: Build a caching layer to prevent duplicate job applications. Store applied job URLs in a local cache file and check it before every application. Team project on shared GitHub repository.
